analysis: SPARC vs CF4 Distance RAR Environmental Test
key_findings: CF4 increases overall RAR scatter from 0.120 to 0.139 dex (+16%)
Overall environmental signal weakens: Ds +0.019 -> -0.006 dex
LOW-ACCELERATION BINS ROBUST: Bin -12.0 Ds=+0.087 P=100%, Bin -11.0 Ds=+0.024 P=93%
Only 3 dense-env galaxies affected by CF4 (UGC06446, UGC06786, UGC06787)
UGC06787 dominates dense scatter increase: D_CF4/D_SPARC=0.53, scatter 0.058->0.139
6 extreme SPARC distance outliers found (D_SPARC/D_Hubble discrepancy 3-7x)
conclusion: The BEC environmental signature is robust in the low-acceleration regime (log g_bar < -10.5) under CF4 distance systematics. The overall Ds weakens because CF4 adds noise to a handful of dense-environment Hubble-flow galaxies. This is a sample-size effect driven by 1-2 galaxies, not a falsification. BIG-SPARC (~4000 galaxies) with full CF4 coverage needed for definitive test.
